title: Grilled Tunisian Bread
description: A simple and flavorful bread dish from Tunisia, perfect for a light meal or snack.

ingredients.name: Peppery oil
ingredients.notes: use a peppery oil for best flavor

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the Tunisian bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Drizzle the peppery oil over the bread slices.
Place the bread slices on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly toasted and slightly charred.
While the bread is cooking, thinly slice the white onion.
Once the bread is done, top each slice with a few slices of onion.
